title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Pinney Talfourd LLP Client Account Ltd
body: "Application number 5432  Applicant Pinney Talfourd LLP objected to the name used by Pinney Talfourd LLP Client Account Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.   This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 5 November 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Pinney Talfourd LLP Client Account Ltd is changed to 16258894, Ltd. "
